log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 13
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:15+9=24 vs DC 17] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
REASONING: Power Word Stun on Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster (HP 59 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 13
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:10+9=19 vs DC 17] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Finger of Death on Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster. 7d8+30 necrotic.
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster.
→ Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster: CON save [d20:9+3=12 vs DC 20] FAIL! 26 necrotic damage. HP: 33/59
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster --- HP: 33/59 | AC: 13
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 17 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:6+9=15 vs DC 17] FAIL!
--- Lich --- HP: 135/135 | AC: 17 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:3+9=12 vs DC 17] FAIL. Still paralyzed.
